title: Runway Launches Media Router: Automatically Switch AI Models to Save Tokens, from Creative Validation to Final Production in One Go
excerpt: Runway announced the launch of Runway Media Router, which allows flexible switching between AI models for generating images, videos, and audio based on the use
content_html:
Runway announced the launch of Runway Media Router, which allows flexible switching between AI models for generating images, videos, and audio based on the use case. The system categorizes model selection criteria into three aspects: quality, processing speed, and cost. It automatically switches models according to the priority of each request, significantly reducing the burden on developers of comparing and manually switching models one by one.

Smart matching for three scenarios, saving money and time

Runway divides model usage scenarios into three categories: fast generation is suitable for the creative validation stage, where quick output is more important than refinement; slow but high-quality is suitable for the final production stage, where image details and precision are the top priority; medium quality but low cost is suitable for budget-sensitive daily production tasks. For example, video generation for creative validation focuses more on speed, while the final production stage emphasizes quality. The system will automatically match the most suitable model for each stage.

Developers no longer need to repeatedly ponder "which model is the most cost-effective." Media Router will automatically make the optimal choice based on the actual needs of the current task. This on-demand switching model not only effectively reduces Token consumption but also makes the creative process smoother and more efficient.

Supports multiple models including Seedance, GPT Image2, etc.

Currently, Runway Media Router has been launched on the developer platform Runway Dev, supporting the generation of three types of content: images, videos, and audio. It can call models from companies such as Seedance, GPT Image2, and ElevenLabs. This means that developers can access top-tier models from different manufacturers through a unified interface without having to connect to each company's API separately. The launch of this product marks a new phase in AI content generation, shifting from "a single model dominating the market" to "multi-model collaboration and scheduling."

content_html_zh:
Runway 宣布推出 Runway Media Router，它允许在 AI 模型之间灵活切换，以根据用例生成图像、视频和音频。 该系统将模型选择标准分为三个方面：质量、处理速度和成本。 它根据每个请求的优先级自动切换模型，大大减轻了开发人员逐一比较和手动切换模型的负担。

三种场景智能匹配，省钱又省时

Runway将模型使用场景分为三类：快速生成适合创意验证阶段，快速输出比细化更重要；慢但高质量适用于最终制作阶段，其中图像细节和精度是重中之重；中等质量但成本较低，适合预算敏感的日常生产任务。 例如，用于创意验证的视频生成更注重速度，而最终制作阶段则强调质量。 系统会自动匹配每个阶段最合适的模型。

开发者不再需要反复思考“哪种模式最划算”。 Media Router会根据当前任务的实际需要自动做出最优选择。 这种按需切换的模式不仅有效降低了Token消耗，也让创作过程更加顺畅、高效。

支持多种模型，包括 Seedance、GPT Image2 等。

目前，Runway Media Router已在开发者平台Runway Dev上线，支持图像、视频、音频三类内容的生成。 它可以调用 Seedance、GPT Image2 和 ElevenLabs 等公司的模型。 这意味着开发者可以通过统一的接口访问不同厂商的顶级模型，而无需分别连接各个公司的API。 该产品的推出，标志着人工智能内容生成进入新阶段，从“单一模型主导市场”转向“多模型协同调度”。
